appliedUpdates.description: Recorded the observed ~75s readiness wait on port 3102 and noted that /diagnostics/runtime is available but no public fault-injection hook exists for provider outage simulation.

notes: Round 2 used the validation-only `POST /diagnostics/runtime/provider_failure` hook added for the dedicated validation API on port 3102.
Fresh HTTP evidence from worker session 133af0ae-cf7b-4140-9352-1cbd0c2a4a83 confirmed degraded fallback and recovery clearing behavior for VAL-HEALTH-004 and VAL-CROSS-003.
